response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a seasoned Staff/Senior Software Engineer with 15+ years of experience across embedded systems, mobile, desktop, and web — a strong technical profile that far exceeds the junior/mid-level scope of this role. While his TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS skills align well with the required stack, the seniority mismatch creates insurmountable practical problems: salary expectations, risk of disengagement, and near-certain short tenure. Additionally, his resume lists Bangalore, India as his location, which directly conflicts with the high on-site presence requirement, regardless of his current Berlin-based employer. PostgreSQL is not demonstrated — his relational DB exposure references MySQL with MongoDB being his primary data store.
strengths: Deep TypeScript and Node.js proficiency with production-scale experience across multiple roles
React experience (Optilyz) and AWS CDK knowledge satisfy both required and nice-to-have criteria
AI/LLM integration and MCP framework work at re:cinq directly matches the LLM API nice-to-have
concerns: Severely overqualified — Staff/Senior-level trajectory makes junior/mid-level scope a retention and motivation risk
Location listed as Bangalore, India; high on-site presence requirement is likely incompatible
No demonstrable PostgreSQL experience; relational DB usage is minimal compared to MongoDB-heavy history
